titleStmt.title: SII 24.79: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 79. (A.R. No. 210 (A) of 1951-52.) II PRĀKĀRA, INNER WALL OF THE MĒṬṬUNĀCHCHIYĀR SHRINE.

summary.p: Records an endowment to the sabhā for purchase of land for offerings to god by Vaṇḍāḻañjēri Uḍaiyāṉ Veḷḷāḷaṉ Anai alias Vāṇakōvaraiyaṉ of Tirunaṟaiyūr (see No. 94 below), dated in the 32nd regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ceyya tāmaraik kaṇṇan veṇṇaik kūttan purāticuran tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān periya coti
ṟampala muṭaiyānen Ivai yenneḻuttu Itukāṟṟi maṇyatevakkiramavittan sayijñaiyātanamaikku ceytu
kuṇṭur kumaraskandayajñarku bhaṭṭa somayāci yen Ivai yenneḻuttu śrī kulottuṅkacoḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 2 Āvatu
rom śrī kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻañceri vaṇ ṭāḻañ ceri Uṭaiyān veḷān Ūḻikoḷ
pañ ceyyum nampimāṟkum tirunan=tavānañ ceyyum nampimāṟkum nilaniman=tañcey kaikku Ivar pakkal nāṅkaḷ kācu
kattennāṟu niroṭu kālukkut kitaṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai Aṟiñcikaic caturveti maṅkalavatikku maturān=taka
caruppeti maṅkalattu vaṭakkum mel pāṟkellai ttamaccaruppeti maṅkalattu
Innilam Iruveliyum viṟṟuk kuṭuttuk koḷvatāka Emmilicaintavilaip poruḷ Anṟāṭu vaḻaṅku naṟkācu 6 Ikkā
ṭavo Iṟai kāvalukkuk koṇṭa kācu 8 Eṭṭum Ākak kācu 14 Ikkācu patinālum Āvaṇakkaḷiyile
kuṭimaiyum nāṅkaḷe ceyyakkaṭavomāka Iṟai kāvalillāmaluñ ceytu kuṭuttom vaṇṭāḻañceri
yarom Innilattukku Ituve vilaiyāvaṇa māvatākavum Ituve Iṟaikāval piramāṇamāvatākavum
poruḷmāvaruti poruṭcelavolai tārākavum Ipparicu Icaintu IThe inscription is intercepted by walls at several places.—
Digital edition of SII 24.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
